title: Starfall SMP
description: A modpack for the Starfall SMP Minecraft server!
body:
[![Starfall SMP Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Starfall_SMP-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&color=%235865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/DUGwVJgZs9)

This is the official client-side modpack for **Starfall SMP**, a Java Minecraft server focused on community, friendship, and memories.  What sets us apart from other servers is our commitment to fairness and a fun experience for everyone. We have anti-cheat, custom-made quests, planned events, daily rewards, emotes, cosmetics, and so much more each season. To keep things balanced, we delay access to the Nether and End and make them server-wide events, ensuring a more engaging progression.

While this modpack is not required to join the server, it’s recommended for the best experience. It includes QoL (Quality-of-life) mods and performance enhancements used by most players on the server.

### ❓ FAQ 
**Q: Can I add mods or delete mods from the modpack?**

A: It's totally up to you whether to delete or add mods to the modpack.  We recommend keeping it 
as is, as some mods may be bannable or you may encounter issues.  

**Q: I thought that this was a modded server; why is the modpack optional?**

A: We switched from modded to paper.  This is now a client-side modpack that provides a better experience for players on the server.
